headline: Wall Street Lunch: Netflix Draws Bullish Backing As Ad Revenue Seen Doubling To $3B
summary: Netflix (NFLX) is emerging as a lower-volatility business with expanding advertising potential. Morgan Stanley and Wedbush both reiterated bullish views and raised their price targets.
